context: The agent was asked to triage a PR review comment about missing resource limits on a Kubernetes container, classify it, produce corrected YAML, and write a review reply.

checklist.item: Classifies the comment as ACTIONABLE_FIX (missing resource limits is a real safety issue)
Provides corrected YAML with resources.requests (cpu + memory) and resources.limits (memory). CPU limit is omitted or justified — CPU limits cause throttling.
States blast radius: rolling update replaces pods; if requests exceed actual usage, pods may be rescheduled
Provides a rollback plan: revert manifest and re-apply, or kubectl rollout undo
Review reply is concise, references the file, and ends with ✅ Fixed
